description: I received a one year full scholarship from Stony Brook University to pursue my PhD in Computer Science. I am a member of the File Systems and Storage Lab (FSL) and I am advised by Prof. Erez Zadok. I am currently a full-time research assistant working on distributed systems and storage solutions. My work involves developing and optimizing algorithms for data management and retrieval in large-scale distributed environments.

I received my Bachelors in Computer Engineering from Amirkabir University of Technology in 2023. I was a member of the Data Security Lab (DSL) and I was advised by Prof. Babak Sadeghian. My bachelor's thesis was on designing a dynamic distributed file system for automated penetration testing. I also worked with Prof. Ahmad Javadi as a research project assistant on the QJUMP over Network Interface project.
